scope: Germany EV greenfield manufacturing (cells, packs, vehicle assembly, cathode, motor/inverter, recycling, charging equipment), 2015-2026
next_candidate: VARTA Ellwangen (existing cell plant, for tier audit) / Audi Ingolstadt PPE battery assembly / Valmet Kirchardt re-verify

batches.notes: Seeded top-20 German EV greenfield projects largest-investment-first. Total committed investment: $27.6B USD. Mix: 9 cell (3 cancelled), 5 vehicle_assembly (all operating), 5 pack (1 under construction), 1 cathode. FDI dedup matches: Northvolt Heide (row 398), VW PowerCo Salzgitter (row 659), CATL Arnstadt (rows 78+85, two phases of same plant), Gotion Göttingen (row 222), Valmet/CATL Kirchardt (row 86), Kedali Erfurt (row 310). Excluded: CATL Bad Friedrichshall R&D (row 87), CATL Munich R&D (row 88), Samsung Munich R&D (row 459) — all R&D-only, out of manufacturing scope. Borg Warner Darmstadt (rows 56/57) and Leclanche Willstätt (row 326) omitted to stay within 20; should be added in next batch. Schema validated, status×tier compliant, postIRA consistent with 2022-08-16 threshold. Microvast Ludwigsfelde downgraded from Operating to Paused based on Grizzly Research 2024 observations of low utilization.
